title: Centre seeks transfer of challenges to Transgender Amendment Act from High Courts to Supreme Court
description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday heard submissions by the Central government seeking transfer of petitions challenging the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Act, 2026 from various High Courts to the top court.Solicitor General Tushar Mehta sought an early listing of the transfer petition before a Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi. He suggested that High Courts could be requested to defer proceedings in the meantime.“We have filed transf
